hook_type: Direct second-person recursion with explicit referent ('a company on our platform')
tactic: Recursion + cadence-of-three numbers + 'you backed others, now back us'
primary_text:
You've backed a company on our platform. Now you can back the company that runs it.

324 raises. $234M+. 137,000 of you. Every dollar raised through Birchal came from retail investors choosing to own a piece of something they believed in.

Now we're doing the same.

Save your spot. You'll see the offer the moment it goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: The platform you backed is opening up
description: Save your spot. You'll see the offer the moment it goes live.
_source_label: DRC V2 -- B1 Community-as-builder / Recursion (existing investors)
_v2_changes: Subject discipline: opener now names both subjects explicitly. 'A company on our platform' = one of the 324; 'the company that runs it' = Birchal-the-company. Old V1 'You backed a Birchal company. Now you can back Birchal.' was confusing.
Brand grid removed (Naked Life / Our Cow / Medigrowth / Earthletica). Sophisticated reader does not need brand recall. Cadence-of-three numbers carry the proof.
'Every raise was funded by retail investors' -> 'Every dollar raised through Birchal came from retail investors' -- 'through Birchal' anchors the platform without re-introducing the two-Birchal swap.
_drc_playbook: 11 Lifecycle Email Promo / Launch (B2C considered, most-aware, active list)
_drc_audience: B2C considered, most-aware. Existing Birchal investors who have made at least one investment on the platform.
_compliance_findings_resolved: PREOFFER-VERBS: 'save your spot', 'see the offer'. No transaction verbs.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'you'll see the offer the moment it goes live'.
Anti-preferential terms (s 738G): waitlist remains free and equal-access; 'now you can back the company that runs it' does not promise differential terms.
